collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (70 total Queries, 27 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SHOW TABLES FROM `db_toko_lej`
SELECT `id`, `name` FROM `tb_products` ORDER BY `name` ASC
SHOW COLUMNS FROM `tb_transactions`

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') AS period_key, DATE_FORMAT(MIN(t.date), '%m/%Y') AS period_label, SUM(td.qty) AS qty FROM `tb_transaction_details` `td` INNER JOIN `tb_transactions` `t` ON `t`.`id` = `td`.`transaction_id` GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY `period_key` ASC
SELECT * FROM `tb_products`
SHOW COLUMNS FROM `tb_sales_monthly`
SELECT * FROM `tb_sales_monthly` WHERE `product_id` = 1 ORDER BY `year` ASC, `month` ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') AS period_key, DATE_FORMAT(MIN(t.date), '%m/%Y') AS period_label, SUM(td.qty) AS qty FROM `tb_transaction_details` `td` INNER JOIN `tb_transactions` `t` ON `t`.`id` = `td`.`transaction_id` WHERE `td`.`product_id` = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY `period_key` ASC

SELECT t.id AS transaction_id, t.invoice_no, DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS trx_date, SUM(td.qty) AS qty FROM `tb_transaction_details` `td` INNER JOIN `tb_transactions` `t` ON `t`.`id` = `td`.`transaction_id` WHERE `td`.`product_id` = 1 GROUP BY `t`.`id`, `t`.`invoice_no`, `t`.`date` ORDER BY `t`.`date` ASC, `t`.`id` ASC
SELECT * FROM `tb_sales_monthly` WHERE `product_id` = 2 ORDER BY `year` ASC, `month` ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') AS period_key, DATE_FORMAT(MIN(t.date), '%m/%Y') AS period_label, SUM(td.qty) AS qty FROM `tb_transaction_details` `td` INNER JOIN `tb_transactions` `t` ON `t`.`id` = `td`.`transaction_id` WHERE `td`.`product_id` = 2 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY `period_key` ASC

SELECT t.id AS transaction_id, t.invoice_no, DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS trx_date, SUM(td.qty) AS qty FROM `tb_transaction_details` `td` INNER JOIN `tb_transactions` `t` ON `t`.`id` = `td`.`transaction_id` WHERE `td`.`product_id` = 2 GROUP BY `t`.`id`, `t`.`invoice_no`, `t`.`date` ORDER BY `t`.`date` ASC, `t`.`id` ASC
